name: Italian Chili
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Mushroom pieces and stems, drained
1/4 teaspoon - 1/2 tsp Dried red pepper, crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in a large frying pan and drain excess fat.
2. Add onion, green pepper, celery, and garlic to the pan. Cook until the peppers and celery are soft, approximately 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the contents of the frying pan to a 5-quart saucepan or crock pot.
4. Combine all remaining ingredients in the saucepan or crock pot.
5. Mix well.
6. Simmer for at least 30 minutes, or up to two hours for maximum flavor.
